description: UI-side worker demo state and patch-apply function

v.code: const inbox = ctx.getLabel({ model_id: -10, p: 0, r: 0, c: 0, k: 'ui_mgmt_inbox' }); if (!inbox || typeof inbox !== 'object') return; const patch = inbox.payload; if (!patch || patch.version !== 'mt.v0' || !Array.isArray(patch.records)) return; ctx.runtime.applyPatch(patch, { allowCreateModel: true, trustedBootstrap: true }); ctx.rmLabel({ model_id: -10, p: 0, r: 0, c: 0, k: 'ui_mgmt_inbox' });
